member.name: T:ApiMark.DotNet.ApiVisibility
member.summary: Specifies which members are included in the generated API documentation.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.ApiVisibility.Public
member.summary: Include only public members.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.ApiVisibility.PublicAndProtected
member.summary: Include public and protected members.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.ApiVisibility.All
member.summary: Include all members regardless of access modifier.

member.name: T:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator
member.summary: Generates Markdown API documentation from a .NET assembly using Mono.Cecil.
member.remarks: Implements for C#/.NET assemblies. Reads assembly metadata via Mono.Cecil without loading the target assembly into the current process, which ensures reliable operation against arbitrary build outputs and dependency graphs. Pairs the metadata with developer-authored content from the XML documentation file to produce a gradual-disclosure Markdown tree. Not thread-safe; construct and use one instance per generation run.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.DescriptionColumnHeader
member.summary: Column header label used in all generated Markdown tables for the description column.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.ConstructorMethodName
member.summary: The .NET metadata method name used for all instance and static constructors.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator._options
member.summary: Configuration controlling which assembly, XML doc, and visibility filter to use.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.#ctor(ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGeneratorOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with the specified options.
member.remarks: No file system access occurs at construction time; all I/O is deferred to .

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.Generate(ApiMark.Core.IMarkdownWriterFactory)
member.summary: Generates API documentation into the provided writer factory.
member.remarks: Opens the assembly via Mono.Cecil, builds an index from the XML documentation file, then writes the complete Markdown tree: one assembly entrypoint page, one namespace summary per namespace, one type page per visible type, and one detail page per complex member. The is disposed before this method returns.
member.param: The markdown writer factory used to create output files.
member.exception: Thrown when the XML documentation file does not exist.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.WriteTypePage(ApiMark.Core.IMarkdownWriterFactory,System.String,Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition,ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader)
member.summary: Writes the Markdown page for a single type, including a members table and links to complex member pages.
member.param: The type whose page is being written.
XML documentation index for summary and remarks lookups.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.WriteMemberPage(ApiMark.Core.IMarkdownWriterFactory,System.String,Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition,Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition,ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader,System.String)
member.summary: Writes the detailed Markdown page for a single complex member, including signature, parameters, returns, exceptions, remarks, and examples.
member.param: The namespace that owns the declaring type.
The member whose page is being written.
Pre-computed XML doc member identifier for .

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsComplex(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition,ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader)
member.summary: Determines whether warrants its own page based on the complexity rules: parameters, exception docs, multi-line remarks, examples, or asymmetric get/set accessors.
member.param: XML documentation index used for doc-driven complexity checks.
member.returns: true when the member should get a dedicated page.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.HasAsymmetricAccessors(Mono.Cecil.PropertyDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when has both a getter and a setter but they expose different access levels (e.g. public get; internal set;).
member.returns: true when getter and setter have different access levels.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.GetAccessLevel(Mono.Cecil.MethodDefinition)
member.summary: Returns a numeric access level for a method, where higher values are more permissive.
member.returns: An integer from 0 (private) to 4 (public).

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsTypeVisible(Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when satisfies the visibility setting in .
member.returns: true when the type is visible under the current visibility setting.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsMemberVisible(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when satisfies the visibility setting in .
member.returns: true when the member is visible under the current visibility setting.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsMemberPublic(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when is publicly accessible.
member.returns: true when the member is public.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsMemberPublicOrProtected(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when is public or protected.
member.returns: true when the member is public or protected.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsPropertyPublicOrProtected(Mono.Cecil.PropertyDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when has a public or protected getter or setter.
member.returns: true when at least one accessor is publicly or protected-family accessible.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.GetVisibleMembers(Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition)
member.summary: Enumerates all members of that pass the current visibility, obsolete, and compiler-generated filters.
member.param: The type whose members to inspect.
member.returns: An enumerable of visible member definitions.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.ShouldIncludeMember(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when passes both visibility and obsolete filters.
member.returns: true when the member is visible and not filtered out by the obsolete setting.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsSpecialNameNonConstructor(Mono.Cecil.MethodDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when is a special-name accessor that is not a constructor.
member.returns: true for property getters/setters and event add/remove methods.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsCompilerGeneratedField(Mono.Cecil.FieldDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when is a compiler-generated backing field.
member.returns: true when the field name contains angle brackets (compiler-generated backing fields).

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildTypeId(Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition)
member.summary: Builds the XML doc member identifier for a type (e.g. T:Namespace.TypeName).
member.returns: The XML doc member identifier string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildMemberId(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition)
member.summary: Builds the XML doc member identifier for an arbitrary member.
member.returns: The XML doc member identifier string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildMethodId(Mono.Cecil.MethodDefinition)
member.summary: Builds the XML doc member identifier for a method, including parameter type list when present.
member.returns: The XML doc member identifier string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildTypeSignature(Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition)
member.summary: Builds a human-readable C# declaration signature for a type definition.
member.returns: A string of the form public class Name or public interface Name<T>.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildMemberSignature(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Dispatches to the appropriate signature builder based on the runtime member type.
member.param: Used to simplify type names in the signature.
member.returns: A human-readable C# declaration signature string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildMethodSignature(Mono.Cecil.MethodDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a human-readable C# method declaration signature.
member.param: Used to simplify type names in parameters and return type.
member.returns: The method signature string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildPropertySignature(Mono.Cecil.PropertyDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a human-readable C# property declaration signature.
member.param: Used to simplify the property type name.
member.returns: The property signature string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildPropertyAccessors(Mono.Cecil.PropertyDefinition)
member.summary: Builds the accessor portion of a property signature (e.g. get; internal set;).
member.returns: The accessor string to embed in the property signature.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildFieldSignature(Mono.Cecil.FieldDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a human-readable C# field declaration signature.
member.param: Used to simplify the field type name.
member.returns: The field signature string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.BuildEventSignature(Mono.Cecil.EventDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a human-readable C# event declaration signature.
member.param: Used to simplify the event type name.
member.returns: The event signature string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.GetAccessibilityKeyword(Mono.Cecil.MethodDefinition)
member.summary: Returns the C# accessibility keyword for a method (e.g. "public" or "protected").
member.param: The method whose accessibility to report.
member.returns: The lowercase C# accessibility keyword string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.GetMemberDisplayName(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition)
member.summary: Returns the display name for a member as it should appear in documentation tables.
member.param: The member whose display name to compute.
member.returns: The display name string (constructor uses the declaring type's simple name).

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.GetMemberTypeName(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the simplified C# type name for a member as it should appear in a type column.
member.param: The member whose type name to compute.
Used to simplify the type name.
member.returns: The simplified type name string.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.GetSanitizedMemberFileName(Mono.Cecil.IMemberDefinition,Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition)
member.summary: Returns the file-system-safe name used to form the member page path. Constructors use the declaring type name; all others use the member name directly.
member.param: The member whose file name to compute.
member.returns: A string suitable for use as a file name (without extension).

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsCompilerGenerated(Mono.Cecil.ICustomAttributeProvider)
member.summary: Returns true when carries a CompilerGeneratedAttribute, indicating it was synthesized by the compiler.
member.returns: true when the element is compiler-generated.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsCompilerGenerated(Mono.Cecil.TypeDefinition)
member.summary: Returns true when is a compiler-generated type (name contains angle brackets, or carries CompilerGeneratedAttribute).
member.returns: true when the type is compiler-generated.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.IsObsolete(Mono.Cecil.ICustomAttributeProvider)
member.summary: Returns true when carries an ObsoleteAttribute.
member.returns: true when the element is marked obsolete.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGenerator.StripArity(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the generic arity suffix (e.g. `1) from a type name.
member.param: The raw type name that may contain a backtick arity suffix.
member.returns: The name without the arity suffix.

member.name: T:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGeneratorOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGeneratorOptions.AssemblyPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the .NET assembly to document.

member.name: P:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGeneratorOptions.XmlDocPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the XML documentation file produced alongside the assembly. throws if this file does not exist.

member.name: P:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGeneratorOptions.Visibility
member.summary: Gets or sets which members are visible in the generated output. Defaults to .

member.name: P:ApiMark.DotNet.DotNetGeneratorOptions.IncludeObsolete
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether obsolete members are included. Defaults to false.

member.name: T:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier
member.summary: Stateless helper that converts Mono.Cecil instances to readable C# type names.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier.Primitives
member.summary: C# primitive aliases keyed by full CLR name.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier.WellKnownNamespaces
member.summary: Namespaces whose prefix is stripped when displaying generic or plain types.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier.Simplify(Mono.Cecil.TypeReference,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts to a human-readable C# type name, stripping well-known namespaces and the prefix where applicable.
member.remarks: Exists to make generated Markdown signatures readable to C# developers — raw Mono.Cecil type names include CLR full names and generic arity suffixes that are unfamiliar in documentation. Seven simplification rules are applied in a fixed priority order: (1) C# primitive aliases, (2) array bracket notation, (3) Nullable<T> → T?, (4) well-known namespace stripping, (5) context namespace prefix stripping, (6) recursive generic argument simplification, and (7) nullable reference annotation suffix. Stateless and thread-safe; no shared mutable state is modified during the call.
member.param: The Mono.Cecil type reference to simplify.
The namespace of the type that owns this reference, used for prefix stripping.

When , the member carrying this type reference has a NullableAttribute(2) annotation (i.e. the C# 8+ nullable reference type ? suffix). This information cannot be derived from alone because Mono.Cecil stores nullable annotations on the containing member, not on the type reference itself. Callers that inspect member custom attributes should pass when byte value 2 is found.
member.returns: A simplified, human-readable C# type name.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier.SimplifyCore(Mono.Cecil.TypeReference,System.String)
member.summary: Applies Rules 1–6 to produce a simplified type name without nullable-reference annotation.
member.param: The Mono.Cecil type reference to simplify.
The namespace of the enclosing type, used for prefix stripping.
member.returns: A simplified C# type name without a trailing nullable-reference ?.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier.BuildGenericName(Mono.Cecil.GenericInstanceType,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the simplified type name for a generic type instance.
member.param: The generic instance type to represent.
The namespace of the enclosing type, used for prefix stripping.
member.returns: A string of the form Name<Arg1, Arg2>.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier.StripArity(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the generic arity suffix (e.g. `1) from a type name.
member.param: The raw type name that may contain a backtick arity suffix.
member.returns: The name without the arity suffix.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.TypeNameSimplifier.ApplyContextStrip(Mono.Cecil.TypeReference,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the shortest unambiguous name for relative to , stripping that namespace's prefix if present.
member.param: The namespace of the enclosing type.
member.returns: The shortest name that is unambiguous in the given context.

member.name: T:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader
member.summary: Reads and indexes a .NET XML documentation file for fast member-level lookups.

member.name: F:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader._members
member.summary: Index of documentation members keyed by their XML doc identifier.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of from the given path.
member.param: Path to the XML documentation file.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.GetSummary(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the trimmed summary text for , or null if absent.
member.param: The XML doc member identifier (e.g. T:MyNamespace.MyClass).
member.returns: Trimmed summary text, or null.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.GetRemarks(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the trimmed remarks text for , or null if absent.
member.returns: Trimmed remarks text, or null.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.IsMultiLineRemarks(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the remarks for span more than one non-empty line.
member.returns: true if remarks has more than one non-empty line.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.GetExceptions(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all cref attribute values from <exception> elements for .
member.returns: A read-only list of exception cref strings.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.GetParams(System.String)
member.summary: Returns parameter names and descriptions for .
member.returns: A read-only list of (Name, Description) tuples.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.GetReturns(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the trimmed returns text for , or null if absent.
member.returns: Trimmed returns text, or null.

member.name: M:ApiMark.DotNet.XmlDocReader.GetExample(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the trimmed example text for , or null if absent.
member.returns: Trimmed example text, or null.
